action.reasoning: Observation: workspace only has model.py; no train/predict scripts yet. Analysis: must establish full pipeline and submit immediate eval this first iteration. Using offline pretrained SpeechBrain MetricGAN+ in predict.py is the strongest low-risk baseline, while a short training run on our own spectral mask model validates data loading and checkpointing. Decision: write train.py and predict.py, run 2 quick epochs, locally test predict.py on validation-style data, then submit eval with the trained checkpoint (predict.py will ignore checkpoint if needed and use pretrained fallback).
action.command: python train.py --epochs 2 --batch_size 8 --train_limit 1500 --val_limit 128 && mkdir -p local_test/noisy && cp /data/val_noisy/*.wav local_test/noisy/ && ls local_test/noisy | head -20 > local_test/test_files.txt && python predict.py --data_path local_test --checkpoint checkpoints/best.pt --output local_pred.json
